# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: direct-access
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: low-latency-service
        image: your-registry/low-latency-service:1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-service
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-proxy
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: database-proxy
        image: your-registry/database-proxy:1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: DB_HOST
          value: "external-database.example.com"
        - name: DB_PORT
          value: "5432"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-proxy
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: udp-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: udp-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: udp-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: udp-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: udp-service
        image: your-registry/udp-service:1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9000
          protocol: UDP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-service
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  selector:
    app: udp-service
  ports:
  - port: 9000
    targetPort: 9000
    protocol: UDP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: websocket-server
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: websocket-server
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: websocket-server
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: websocket-server
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: websocket-server
        image: your-registry/websocket-server:1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
          protocol: TCP
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8081
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8081
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: websocket-server
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  selector:
    app: websocket-server
  ports:
  - port: 8081
    targetPort: 8081
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-cache
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: high-throughput-cache
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: high-throughput-cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: high-throughput-cache
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: redis
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          protocol: TCP
        command:
        - redis-server
        - --maxmemory
        - "2gb"
        - --maxmemory-policy
        - allkeys-lru
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
          limits:
            memory: "3Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: cache-data
          mountPath: /data
      volumes:
      - name: cache-data
        emptyDir: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-cache
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  selector:
    app: high-throughput-cache
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: metrics-collector
        image: your-registry/metrics-collector:1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9091
          protocol: TCP
          name: metrics
        env:
        - name: SCRAPE_INTERVAL
          value: "5s"
        - name: RETENTION_TIME
          value: "1h"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  selector:
    app: metrics-collector
  ports:
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
    name: api
  - port: 9091
    targetPort: 9091
    protocol: TCP
    name: metrics
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-egress-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: direct-egress-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-egress-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-egress-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: direct-egress-service
        image: your-registry/direct-egress-service:1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8082
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: EXTERNAL_API_URL
          value: "https://api.external-service.com"
        - name: TIMEOUT
          value: "30s"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: direct-egress-service
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  selector:
    app: direct-egress-service
  ports:
  - port: 8082
    targetPort: 8082
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
